title: Compiler syntax and analysis baseline
description:
Compiler bootstrap, **AOT** refactor baseline, **`beskid pack`** with API metadata, **optional null-conditional (`?.`)** operand, **file-scoped module** grammar and resolver/analysis hardening, **module-declaration** compatibility, graph **Std** injection ordering, and parity merge — the syntax and analysis foundation required before v0.2 platform-spec and pipeline work.

## Provenance
- **Closing repository:** `compiler`
- **Closing commit:** [`1f8d62d`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/1f8d62d)
- **Subject:** Finalize compiler parity and stdlib/runtime test updates
- **Band start:** [`dd75bff`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/dd75bff) (*Initial Commit*, 2026-03-05)
- **Closed:** 2026-04-09

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `compiler-foundation`
- **Milestone:** `v01-compiler-parity` (deliverable **#1**)

## Relation
Anchored tasks: `compiler-initial-commit`, `aot-refactor`, `pack-command`, `graph-std-injection-test`, `compiler-parity-merge`. Same workstream also covers `optional-null-operand`, `file-scoped-modules`, `file-scoped-module-docs`, `file-scoped-analysis-hardening`, `module-declaration-compat`, and `superrepo-compiler-submodule`. Closes on compiler [`1f8d62d`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/1f8d62d) before **v01-corelib-submodule** stdlib consolidation.
